description: Accounts in Arabic on recto, medieval-era. The scribe made use of Coptic-Zimam numerals. The neighboring shelfmark ENA 3256.16v was reused for the same vocalized piyyut (FGP) and it seems possible that both Arabic texts are related but not a direct join. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
